title: OpenScholar: Synthesizing Scientific Literature with Retrieval-Augmented Language Models
abstract: This work synthesizes scientific literature with retrieval-augmented language models and studies citation hallucinations in academic writing.

title: GhostCite: A Large-Scale Analysis of Citation Validity in the Age of Large Language Models
abstract: We measure phantom references, fabricated metadata, and citation validity across many large language models.

title: REASONS: A Benchmark for Retrieval and Automated Citations of Scientific Sentences
abstract: This benchmark studies retrieval, citation selection, and scientific sentence attribution.
